title: ITT Who would you see before Tanging
display_title: ITT Who would you see before Tanging
wikitext:
[]: If Instrumentality were to take place, who...             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:00 am Would you wish to appear in front of you right before you became one with Mother once more? Lets try not to post nothing but other members names. This does not have to be within the Eva universe, it can be real people...Sorry Asuka fans. I myself thought of this while I was laying in bed just looking at the ceiling till the Price is Right came on...I do not know who I would want to appear in front of me. If I had to pick someone I would say either Jess or Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:07 am My entire family tree back to prehistoric times. Seeing a sequence of ancestors all the way back to my ultra-great grandparent ameoba-like things would be fun to watch before I get tanged.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:15 am Sammaeloo wrote: My entire family tree back to prehistoric times. Seeing a sequence of ancestors all the way back to my ultra-great grandparent ameoba-like things would be fun to watch before I get tanged.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:23 am Hideaki Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:23 am I'm guessing my best friend that I've had since I was a kid would probably appear before me.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:28 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Hideaki Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:33 am Chuck Norris is cool and all but wouldn't you rather see someone you love before you "die"? I rather see someone I love so I would not feel so alone.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:36 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Hideaki Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:38 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Chuck Norris is cool and all but wouldn't you rather see someone you love before you "die"?

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:55 am My boyfriend cosplaying as Alucard from castlevania

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 10:55 am It's alright, I know you mean no harm. I love who I am with now but it would be something to see the ones I loved since passed or left...Maybe old friends or something along those lines. I love Jess but having Kaworu appear would make me smile as well then explode.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Aug 06, 2009 11:20 am not telling you

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Aug 06, 2009 11:27 am Evangelionfreak wrote: uhduh Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by TheRatherDVD » Thu Aug 06, 2009 5:07 pm Myself. I'm kind of like Narcissus. I'm not allowed to look in the mirror, I get lost in my eyes. In all honesty though I would probably see either a person in my family.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 06, 2009 7:24 pm My ex. For those who know, yes. For those who don't, too bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Aug 06, 2009 8:35 pm I don't know that many people and I am not really close to the people I DO know (not including family) anyway. So maybe, like Aoba, I'd see my own fear.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Aug 06, 2009 9:17 pm Hmmm well this really depends on the criteria If this is limited to people I've known presonally, probably my ex girlfreind If its limited to people who are real probably Chiaki Kiriyama If it can be anyone even fictitious people it would be my tentacle girl character with the vagina dentata from that one rp.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Fri Aug 07, 2009 10:57 am Well, seeing as I'm a creepy, anti-social, misanthrope who won't open my heart to anyone, I'd probably get the naked Rei S&M horde. Weeeeeelll, I WAS close to in love with someone once, but now it disgusts me to think about it, because I'd reduced myself to a clingy, desperate shell of a human being. But there was a good year or two period when I would have to say I would've seen that bitch appear in front of me. But I rather like being cold and lonely, so yeah. More for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Fri Aug 07, 2009 3:23 pm Eh, apparently I'm the only one that DOESN'T want some outlandish character to tang them, because I'd probably want to see my ex-girlfriend before I die (I still love her, despite all of the crap I've been through). Failing that, Leona Heidern.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Fri Aug 21, 2009 4:34 pm Wow, exes are popular. ^^; My last boyfriend said explicitly that I wasn't ever going to see him again, so while it'd be fun to be all "SURPRISE, YOU WERE WRONG", I think... well... let's be honest, I think he wouldn't mind seeing me again if it were the end of the world. He just doesn't want to get caught up in my unbalanced hijinks. Ha~ take that, ex-boyfriend! Otherwise I'd go for my ex-girlfriend. She's awesome but lives far away. Tang brings you closer together. Mmmm~
